title: verify-work-email — output
description: Fields written into each contact object inside revops.public.prospects.enrichment.contacts[] after Hunter.io verification. Written via UPDATE prospects SET enrichment = ... (JSONB merge). No new columns or tables required.

verif.description: Hunter.io email-verifier status field (d.status). Null if Hunter API call fails.

accept_all.description: True when the domain accepts all addresses regardless of validity (d.accept_all).

verified_by.description: Provenance stamp. Idempotency sentinel: contacts with this field set are skipped on re-run.

x-target-table.write_path: enrichment.contacts[*] (where email non-null and verified_by absent)
x-target-table.write_op: UPDATE prospects SET enrichment = jsonb_set(..., contacts) WHERE id = :id

x-secondary-output.description: verify-contacts.mjs also does LinkedIn backfill (Serper, name-validated) as a side effect, writing linkedin and linkedin_source into the same contacts JSONB. This is OUT OF SCOPE for verify-work-email. Should be a separate activity binding if formally tracked.
